Static production checks

Required pages exist, manifest exists, canonical identities are present, and public-action prohibitions are scanned before deployment.

PASSGeneration
0Wallet calls
0Broadcasts
0Approvals
Claim boundary

What this deployment means

It means the public website, proof room, local chamber, schemas, and manifests were generated and published. It does not mean an audit completed, a Mainnet transaction occurred, funds moved, factual correctness was certified, or the expert console was activated.

Mainnet capability conformance

Code-backed operating claims.

The repository includes automated checks for canonical addresses, code presence through public Ethereum RPC, public-safety boundaries, exact approval controls, wallet isolation, and action preflight requirements. This is an automated software assurance package, not a third-party audit opinion.

Read capability conformance JSON

Final Assurance Kernel v11

Capability claims are now checked against implementation files.

The assurance kernel verifies canonical addresses, lifecycle actions, public default-deny boundaries, Expert Console gates, Sovereign Machine Economy lineage, ascendant particle motion, schemas, manifests, and build artifacts.

Open Final AssuranceAssurance JSON
Verification room · no execution authority.
